signals: OpenAI confirma entrenamiento de GPT-5.2 y 5.3 sobre Blackwell (GB200) y Hopper de NVIDIA.
Google DeepMind lanza Gemma 4 bajo Apache 2.0, optimizado para razonamiento agente en local.
Soberanía de IA en Reino Unido se consolida con el supercomputador Isambard-AI de 21 exaflops.
Arquitecturas de vehículos autónomos migran hacia modelos unificados end-to-end de alta complejidad.
Google DeepMind expande su presencia estratégica en India para ciencia y educación mediante IA.
risks: Dependencia crítica de infraestructura Blackwell/Hopper para el escalado de modelos frontera.
Escasez de datos de sensores físicamente precisos para el entrenamiento de IA física y autónoma.
Fragmentación geopolítica en IA por el auge de iniciativas nacionales de LLM soberanos.
watch: Tasa de adopción de flujos agenticos locales impulsados por el lanzamiento de Gemma 4.
Resultados de los modelos GPT-5.3 Codex en la capacidad de autoprogramación de agentes.
Efecto de Lyria 3 Pro en la industria de creación de contenido sonoro de larga duración.

items.title: As AI Grows More Complex, Model Builders Rely on NVIDIA
items.summary: Unveiling what it describes as the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work, OpenAI launched GPT-5.2 in December. The model was trained and deployed on NVIDIA infrastructure, including NVIDIA Hopper and GB200 NVL72 systems. GPT-5.3 Codex — the first OpenAI agentic coding model to help build itself — was released in February and […]
items.why: Confirmación del uso de GB200 para GPT-5.2/5.3 y el giro hacia modelos puramente agenticos para desarrollo de software.

items.title: NVIDIA Research Shapes Physical AI
items.summary: AI and graphics research breakthroughs in neural rendering, 3D generation and world simulation power robotics, autonomous vehicles and content creation.
items.why: Investigación en simulación de mundos y rendering neuronal es clave para la robótica autónoma real.

items.title: Reaching Across the Isles: UK-LLM Brings AI to UK Languages With NVIDIA Nemotron
items.summary: Celtic languages — including Cornish, Irish, Scottish Gaelic and Welsh — are the U.K.’s oldest living languages. To empower their speakers, the UK-LLM sovereign AI initiative is building an AI model based on NVIDIA Nemotron that can reason in both English and Welsh, a language spoken by about 850,000 people in Wales today. Enabling high-quality […]
items.why: Uso de Nemotron para preservar lenguas regionales (Galés/Gaélico) resalta la tendencia de IA nacional.

items.title: Isambard-AI, the UK’s Most Powerful AI Supercomputer, Goes Live
items.summary: The University of Bristol’s Isambard-AI, powered by NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchips, delivers 21 exaflops of AI performance, making it the fastest system in the U.K. and among the most energy-efficient globally.
items.why: Isambard-AI posiciona a Reino Unido con 21 exaflops de rendimiento, facilitando soberanía tecnológica.

items.title: Innovation to Impact: How NVIDIA Research Fuels Transformative Work in AI, Graphics and Beyond
items.summary: The roots of many of NVIDIA’s landmark innovations — the foundational technology that powers AI, accelerated computing, real-time ray tracing and seamlessly connected data centers — can be found in the company’s research organization, a global team of around 400 experts in fields including computer architecture, generative AI, graphics and robotics. Established in 2006 and […]
items.why: Relevancia del departamento de investigación de NVIDIA en el desarrollo de hardware acelerado.

items.title: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" in...
items.summary: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" into a photorealistic masterpiece. Learn more about GauGAN2 now: [nvda.ws/3oNitRX](https://t.co/IhNldsaEYV) The media could not be played.
items.why: GauGAN2 se mantiene como herramienta creativa base pero superada por nuevos modelos difusores.

items.title: Applications Now Open for $60,000 NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Awards
items.summary: Bringing together the world’s brightest minds and the latest accelerated computing technology leads to powerful breakthroughs that help tackle some of the biggest research problems. To foster such innovation, the NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Program provides grants, mentors and technical support to doctoral students doing outstanding research relevant to NVIDIA technologies. The program, in its 25th […]
items.why: Inversión en talento doctoral para asegurar el pipeline de investigación en tecnologías NVIDIA.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases New AI Models and Developer Tools to Advance Autonomous Vehicle Ecosystem
items.summary: Autonomous vehicle (AV) stacks are evolving from many distinct models to a unified, end-to-end architecture that executes driving actions directly from sensor data. This transition to using larger models is drastically increasing the demand for high-quality, physically based sensor data for training, testing and validation. To help accelerate the development of next-generation AV architectures, NVIDIA […]
items.why: Transición de vehículos autónomos a arquitecturas unificadas exige simulaciones físicas de mayor fidelidad.

items.title: Introducing Quality mode on Grok Imagine – powered by our most advanced image generation model. Quality mode gives you enhanced details, stronger text render...
items.summary: Introducing Quality mode on Grok Imagine – powered by our most advanced image generation model. Quality mode gives you enhanced details, stronger text rendering, and higher levels of creative control. Now available on web and mobile. Try it at [grok.com/imagine](https://t.co/zGhs9czkC5)
items.why: Actualización incremental de Grok Imagine para mejorar renders de texto y detalles en generación de imagen.

items.title: Accelerating discovery in India through AI-powered science and education
items.summary: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education
items.why: Google DeepMind expande su influencia en mercados emergentes y ciencia global mediante alianzas nacionales.

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: Bubble that says "Personal Intelligence" with Google G, Google Photos logo, and Gmail logo around it
items.why: Integración de IA personal en Gmail y Fotos marca el avance de Google hacia agentes de consumo masivo.

items.title: CEO Interview with Steve Kim of Chips&Media
items.summary: I’m Steve Kim, the CEO of Chips&Media. I’ve been immersed in the multimedia imaging industry for approximately two decades. Prior to joining Chips&Media, I spent over five years working within handset manufacturing companies. Following more than ten years here at Chips&Media in roles spanning Marketing, Sales,… Read More The post CEO Interview with Steve Kim of Chips&Media appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Enfoque en IP de video especializado para el procesamiento de medios en hardware de IA.

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: Sizzle video showing new capabilities from Lyria 3 Pro
items.why: Lyria 3 Pro mejora la capacidad de generar pistas largas, impactando la creación de contenido multimedia.

items.title: Meet Gemma 4: our new family of open models you can run on your own hardware. Built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows, we’re releasing them under ...
items.summary: Meet Gemma 4: our new family of open models you can run on your own hardware. Built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows, we’re releasing them under an Apache 2.0 license. Here’s what’s new ![Image 3: 🧵](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg) The media could not be played.
items.why: Gemma 4 democratiza razonamiento avanzado y agentes en hardware local bajo licencia Apache 2.0.

items.title: It’s the Humidity: How International Researchers in Poland, Deep Learning and NVIDIA GPUs Could Change the Forecast
items.summary: For more than a century, meteorologists have chased storms with chalkboards, equations, and now, supercomputers. But for all the progress, they still stumble over one deceptively simple ingredient: water vapor. Humidity is the invisible fuel for thunderstorms, flash floods, and hurricanes. It’s the difference between a passing sprinkle and a summer downpour that sends you […]
items.why: Aplicación de deep learning para resolver variables críticas de humedad en pronósticos meteorológicos.
